title: Editable Story drafts and initial Card generation

features.title: Initiator Story draft and explicit Card application
features.description: Let an initiator create, edit, review, and explicitly apply a deterministic structured Story draft into a new Goal Space and initial Cards.
acceptance_criteria: Draft output is schema-valid and editable before any persistent task is created.
Only an authorized initiator can apply the draft.
Application does not duplicate Cards on retry and leaves no partial Cards on failure.
No external I/O or automatic Card execution occurs.
UI and documents clearly label deterministic fixture behavior.
definition_of_done: Required tests pass or have documented exceptions
